glossary.subject: New {{mappings.orderType}} order generated (No: {{mappings.orderNumber}} Device: {{mappings.deviceType}} Site: {{mappings.siteId}})
glossary.subtitle:
Hello,

A new {{mappings.orderType}} order has been generated for {{mappings.deviceType}} device {{mappings.siteId}} site with order number {{mappings.orderNumber}}.
Please check the {{ mappings.url }} with the order number for more information.

Thank you!
glossary.footerText: This is an automated email. Please do not reply to this email.
